title: The Day Peace Began to Collapse
overview: Watari Naoto and his sister Suzu try to live a normal life. His destructive childhood friend Satsuki returns.

title: Small Lies
overview: The plants in the garden are beginning to sprout. But so are the small lies that everybody employs.

title: Worldly Desires, Begone
overview: Ishihara-san has the image that Naoto is a perfect, kind, chaste saint. Can he kill all his desires, though?

title: Showing and Being Seen
overview: Everyone is going to the beach. Satsuki and Ishihara get bathing suits. What will Naoto say to them?

title: Ideal Partner
overview: On their walk, Naoto and Ishihara run into Fujioka, her "ex-boyfriend". What really happened between them?

title: Confession
overview: After overcoming multiple obstacles, Ishihara finally confesses her feelings to Naoto. What is his response?

title: After School, Just Before Summer Break
overview: Ishihara and Naoto go on a date at the zoo, albeit with Suzu in tow.

title: A Cute Junior
overview: Naoto has his first day on the job. Satsuki goes to her new job, but it's in the seedy part of town?!

title: The Fireworks
overview: After the fireworks, a violent storm forces Naoto, Ishihara-san, and Satsuki to spend the night together.

title: A Relationship I Don't Want to Mess Up
overview: Ishihara leaves in the morning, leaving much to be discussed. But Naoto is in the movies and misses 23 calls.

title: Still a Child
overview: Naoto meets Ishihara's mom who thinks Ishihara is still a child. Then Naoto knocks over a bag with condoms...

title: Being Independent
overview: Yukari's mom wants Naoto and Yukari to break up. But Naoto decides that he doesn't want to give anything up.

title: Do You Really Love Her?
overview: Naoto decides to talk to Ishihara-san's mother and his honesty disarms her. Meanwhile, Satsuki is moving away?

title: Nao-kun Mk. II
overview: Naoto meets Satsuki's family. Why did she have to come home so suddenly? Who's Nao-kun Mk 2?!

title: What It Means to Love Someone
overview: Satsuki's emotions are a mess. Trying to get rid of the bad feelings, she tells Naoto she loves him.

title: A Contract for Sex
overview: Ishihara-san broke up with Naoto?! And now Satsuki is offering to have sex with Naoto?!

title: Answers for Satsuki and Ishihara-san
overview: After a long time of soul searching, Naoto finally has an answer for both girls. Who is he going to pick?

title: What They're Searching For
overview: Naoto goes back to his old home to get the laptop, but can't find it. Instead he meets a woman named Rika.

title: Seeing Things
overview: Satsuki has fully disappeared. But on the school trip to Okinawa, Naoto keeps seeing glimpses of her. How?!

title: Now's My Chance
overview: Satsuki is leaving Okinawa this afternoon but she still won't meet Naoto. He has to figure out a way see her.

title: Honest Feelings
overview: Naoto has a date with Satsuki, but Makina wants to spend the day with him. Can he make it on time to Satsuki?

title: The One I Need
overview: Naoto Watari lives solely for his little sister, until his chaotic childhood friend storms back into his life.

title: A Story from Another Time
overview: Naoto finally manages to tell Satsuki how he really feels, and Satsuki's also ready to take the plunge.

title: New Life
overview: Abe tells Tokui that Satsuki might be pregnant! Tokui also finally reveals something about his past love.

title: The Shape of a Family
overview: Naoto and Satsuki attend Yayoi and Naozumi's wedding. Later they talk about the shape of family.

title: One Last Thing to Make Sure Of
overview: Naoto and Satsuki's summer together is about to end. Where will their individual paths take them?
